creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:
On Sat, Oct 14, 2006 at 02:20:55AM +0400, Andrey V. Elsukov wrote:

> I've tried mount ufs to the same mountpoint. Successfull.
> System panic after first unmounting when i try read directory listing.
> 
> >How-To-Repeat:
> 
> # mount -o ro /dev/ad4s3d /media/disk3
> # mount -o ro /dev/ad4s3d /media/disk3
> # umount /media/disk3
> # ls /media/disk3

This is a known bug documented in other PRs.

Kris
